name: Product: Data Science Track by Kayfa
pitch: A rigorous 5-month hybrid program designed to transform beginners into professional Data Scientists through a blend of flexible learning and live, interactive mentorship.
curriculum_highlights: **Data Mastery with Python:** Deep dive into cleaning, scraping, and analysis using Pandas, NumPy, and OOP concepts.
**Business Intelligence & SQL:** Build professional dashboards with **Power BI** and manage enterprise data using **MS SQL Server** (queries, stored procedures).
**Advanced Analytics:** Go beyond basics with **Advanced Excel** (Pivot Tables, DAX, Power Query) and Business Statistics.
**Machine Learning:** Build predictive models using Supervised/Unsupervised learning, Neural Networks, and Regression algorithms.
**Applied Experience:** Students solve real business problems through 2 major Capstone Projects and continuous hands-on workshops.
career_growth: **Global Readiness:** Includes a placement test and tailored **Business English** training to prepare for international roles.
**Career Launchpad:** A dedicated "Professional Skills" module covers CV writing, interview simulations, and career path planning.
**Holistic Support:** Continuous guidance to ensure students are not just coders, but problem solvers.
trust_signals: **Triple Certification:** Graduates receive a Kayfa certificate, with options for international accreditation from the **University of Delaware** and **Leeds Academy**.
**Proven Quality:** A community of 15,000+ learners and 30+ expert instructors (e.g., Mustafa Othman).
**Industry Partners:** Curriculum aligned with market needs, backed by partners like Microsoft and GIZ.
**Closing Value:** "From raw data to decision-making models—this track equips you with the complete toolkit used by top companies today."
closing_value: From raw data to decision-making models—this track equips you with the complete toolkit used by top companies today.

name: Product: SOC Track by Kayfa
pitch: A specialized 5-month hybrid program designed to forge battle-ready SOC Analysts through intense hands-on training with industry-standard SIEM tools and real-world attack simulations.
curriculum_highlights: **Core Infrastructure:** Mastery of Network Security (OSI, Subnetting, Firewalls) and OS Administration (Linux CLI & Windows Active Directory/GPO).
**SIEM Mastery:** Deep dive into the market leaders: **Splunk** (SPL queries, Dashboards) and **IBM QRadar** (AQL, Offense Management).
**Defensive Operations:** Comprehensive training on the Cyber Kill Chain, Incident Response lifecycles, and proactive **Threat Hunting**.
**Forensics & Analysis:** Introduction to Digital Forensics (Memory/Disk analysis) and handling Chain of Custody.
**War Room Experience:** Students tackle real scenarios like Ransomware analysis and "Boss of the SOC" (BOTS) challenges in 2 major Capstone Projects.
career_growth: **Global Readiness:** tailored **English for Business** training to prepare for international security roles.
**Career Launchpad:** A dedicated "Professional Skills" module covers CV optimization, technical interview prep, and career pathing.
**Soft Skills:** Focus on communication and reporting—critical for explaining breaches to stakeholders.
trust_signals: **Triple Certification:** Graduates receive a Kayfa certificate, with options for international accreditation from the **University of Delaware** and **Leeds Academy**.
**Expert Mentorship:** Learn from practitioners like Dr. Abdelrahman and top industry veterans.
**Proven Track Record:** Joined by 15,000+ learners; curriculum aligned with global market demands.
**Closing Value:** "From monitoring logs to hunting threats—this track builds the exact skill set required to defend modern enterprises."
closing_value: From monitoring logs to hunting threats—this track builds the exact skill set required to defend modern enterprises.

name: Product: AI Track by Kayfa
pitch: A comprehensive 5-month interactive live program designed to transform learners into job-ready AI Engineers through rigorous practice and expert mentorship.
curriculum_highlights: **Next-Gen AI:** Mastering Generative AI (GANs, VAEs), Prompt Engineering, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
**Advanced Systems:** Building autonomous AI Agents, Decision Systems, and Reinforcement Learning.
**Core Fundamentals:** Deep Learning, Computer Vision (CNNs), and NLP (Transformers/BERT).
**Production Skills (MLOps):** Deployment using Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and model management with MLflow/DVC.
**Real-World Application:** Students build a professional portfolio with complex Capstone Projects and Case Studies.
career_growth: **Business English:** Tailored language training (General or Business level) for the global tech market.
**Soft Skills & Prep:** specialized coaching on CV writing, interview simulations, and career path planning.
**Holistic Approach:** We don't just teach code; we build professional character.
trust_signals: **Dual Accreditation:** Graduates earn a Kayfa certificate with options for international accreditation from **University of Delaware** and **Leeds Academy**.
**Proven Impact:** Trusted by 15,000+ learners and partners like Microsoft, GIZ, and Paymob.
**Expert Access:** Direct mentorship and code reviews from industry veterans (e.g., Dr. Karim).
**Closing Value:** "This is not just a course; it is a full career transformation backed by international recognition."
closing_value: This is not just a course; it is a full career transformation backed by international recognition.

name: Fullstack Development Diploma

name: 🔴 Product: Penetration Testing & Ethical Hacking Track by Kayfa
pitch: A certified 48-hour offensive security program that takes complete beginners and builds them into job-ready Junior Penetration Testers — through 100% hands-on lab execution using the same tools and methodologies as professional red teams worldwide.
curriculum_highlights: **Legal & Ethical Foundations:** Cybercrime law, ethical hacking principles, Rules of Engagement (ROE) documentation, and the 5-phase penetration testing methodology.
**Linux & CLI Mastery:** Full filesystem navigation, user/permission management (chmod/chown), log analysis with grep/awk, and Bash scripting for task automation.
**Network & Traffic Analysis:** Deep dive into TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP protocols; live packet capture and PCAP analysis using **Wireshark**; understanding attacks at the packet level.
**Reconnaissance & Enumeration:** OSINT and passive recon, live host discovery and port scanning with **Nmap**, service enumeration, banner grabbing, and full attack surface mapping.
**Web Application Security:** HTTP anatomy, session management, **Burp Suite** (Proxy & Repeater), and exploitation of SQL Injection, XSS, and IDOR vulnerabilities.
**Exploitation & Password Attacks:** Brute-forcing SSH/FTP with **Hydra**, hash cracking with **Hashcat** and **John the Ripper**, and working with the RockYou wordlist.
**Post-Exploitation:** Linux privilege escalation methodology, SUID/SGID misconfiguration abuse, Cron job exploitation, and automated enumeration with **LinPEAS**.
**Professional Reporting:** Writing executive summaries, CVSS-based risk scoring, reproduction steps, and remediation recommendations — the #1 career differentiator.
career_growth: **Direct Job Targets:** Junior Penetration Tester, SOC Tier-1 Analyst, Vulnerability Assessment Analyst, Web Application Security Tester, and Freelance Bug Bounty Hunter (HackerOne / Bugcrowd / Intigriti).
**Certification Pathway:** Graduates are primed for eJPT, CompTIA Security+, PNPT, CEH, and ultimately OSCP — unlocking senior red team and consulting roles.
**Portfolio-Ready Output:** Students leave with a real penetration test report they can show employers — the strongest possible proof of skill at the junior level.
closing_value: Stop watching hacking tutorials — start executing real attacks in a legal lab. Kayfa gives you the tools, the mentor, the lab, and the report to land your first offensive security role.
